sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Blocks at starting position. Try the path that worked before: UP 8 → RIGHT 3 → DOWN 3
# But this time, check the result after each step

# UP 8
result = action(['UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        print(f"After 8 UP - Orange: {n['boundary']}")
        break
print("Game over:", result.get('game_over', False))

# RIGHT 3
if not result.get('game_over', False):
    result2 = action(['RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT'])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'O':
            print(f"After 3 RIGHT - Orange: {n['boundary']}")
            break
    print("Game over:", result2.get('game_over', False))
    
    # DOWN 3
    if not result2.get('game_over', False):
        result3 = action(['DOWN', 'DOWN', 'DOWN'])
        seg = current_frame.segmentation
        for n in seg['nodes']:
            if n['color'] == 'O':
                print(f"After 3 DOWN - Orange: {n['boundary']}")
                break
        print("Game over:", result3.get('game_over', False))
        print("Level completed:", result3.get('level_completed', False))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
